title: Make your mark
prompt: In your lab, create three things: a folder called workshop, an empty file workshop/notes.txt, and a file name.txt containing exactly the word ready. Useful commands: mkdir NAME (make a folder), touch FILE (make an empty file), echo text > FILE (make a file containing text).

files.contents: Build: a 'workshop' folder, an empty workshop/notes.txt, and name.txt holding the word ready.
